data.body:
[Teacher's Day Special Gift]

Today we're celebrating Teacher's Day, Sensei!
Please accept our special token of appreciation delivered to your in-game mailbox. *^^*

🗓️Event Period:
5/15 (Wed) 3:00 AM ~ 5/22 (Wed) 2:59 PM (UTC)
